div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute vol_diff per strike
call_vol_diff = volume_now - volume_prev
put_vol_diff = volume_now - volume_prev

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute PCR
pcr_global = sum(put_oi) / sum(call_oi)
pcr_atm = sum(put_oi ATM±3) / sum(call_oi ATM±3)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sum OI totals
oi_total_call = sum(call_oi all strikes)
oi_total_put = sum(put_oi all strikes)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Aggregate ΔOI
oi_change_call = sum(call_delta_oi all strikes)
oi_change_put = sum(put_delta_oi all strikes)
oi_change_call_atm = sum(call_delta_oi ATM±3)
oi_change_put_atm = sum(put_delta_oi ATM±3)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute oi_imbalance_atm
(put_oi - call_oi) / (put_oi + call_oi)
for ATM ±3 zone · null if both = 0

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Select active strikes
top 3 by (call_vol_diff + put_vol_diff)
top 3 by abs(call_delta_oi) + abs(put_delta_oi)
dedup → max 6 strikes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Normalise strength across full chain
strength_volume = min-max(vol_diff)
strength_oi = min-max(abs delta_oi)
strength = 0.5 × vol + 0.5 × oi

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Update chain_cache
store snapshot as prev for next diff

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cache ready — tick handler reads from here
